mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repairorder (id, dormBuilding, roomNumber, phoneNumber, deviceType, status, descriptionText, createTime, updateTime, processTime, priorityLevel, comments) VALUES (#{id}, #{dormBuilding}, #{roomNumber}, #{phoneNumber}, #{deviceType}, #{status}, #{descriptionText}, Now(), Now(), NULL, #{priorityLevel}, #{comments})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repairorder WHERE id = #{id} ORDER BY orderId DESC
SELECT * FROM repairorder ORDER BY orderId
SELECT * FROM repairorder WHERE status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE repairorder SET phoneNumber = #{phoneNumber}, descriptionText = #{descriptionText}, status = #{status}, priorityLevel = #{priorityLevel}, comments = #{comments}, updateTime = Now(), processTime = Now() WHERE orderId = #{orderId}
